headline: CPAC MAGA Bros 😩💸 MIXED on Trump Econ YEET 📉🍑
text:
CPAC Texas Rodeo 🤠🐂 had CONSERVATIVE DADDIES 👨‍🍼🇺🇸 SWEATING 😰💦 over Trump Econ VIBES 📈❓ – 'AFFORDABILITY 💳🚫 is the BIGGEST DONG 😩🍆 THING' spilling the TEA ☕ from wallet-worried bros! Some MAGA SIMPS 🤡🤑 hyping 'Trump Daddy 🍊👑 FIXED IT ALL 🚀' but others RAGING 🤬📉 cuz GAS ⛽💸 and GROCERIES 🛒🍞 still BALL-BUSTING 🥜💥 pricier than Elon’s X premium 🐦💰!

Texas CPAC 🔥🐎 CIRCUS 🎪 with conservatives SPLIT like a bad divorce 👰‍♀️💔 – HALF THIRSTY 🤤 for 'ECON BOOM 📊🔥 under ORANGE GOD 🍊✨' yelling 'JOBS GALORE 🏭💪 UNEMPLOYMENT LOW AF 📉😤!' But the SALTIES 🧂😭 moaning 'INFLATION 🤑📈 eating my BBQ budget 🍖😢 – groceries up 25% 🚀💸, can't even afford ARBY'S WE HAVE THE MEATS 🥩🤤!' Affordability QUEENS 👑🚫 reigning supreme, even CPAC Chad bros admitting 'WALLET PAIN 😩💳 bigger than Jan 6 drama 🏛️🔥!' 

MAGA BASEBALL 🧢 split like Astros cheating scandal ⚾🤥 – some 'TRUMP TSUNAMI 🌊🍊 WASHED AWAY BIDEN BULLSHIT 💩' but real talkers dropping BOMBS 💣: 'Eggs 🥚💸 cost more than my ex's OnlyFans sub 😤📱!' Conservatives COCKBLOCKED 🐔🚫 by prices, yelling 'FIX THE PUMP ⛽🍆 PRICES, DON!' while others simp HARD 🤤 for stock market highs 📈🤑 ignoring Main Street MELTDOWN 🛣️😱. CPAC vibe check? HALF WOKE 📱😤 to econ HYPE vs REALITY GAP 🤯💥 – Trump fans THROBBING ⬆️ for tariffs 🛡️🇨🇳 but affordability SIMPS crying 'MY CHECKOUT LINE 🛒💦 LONGER THAN EPSTEIN'S FLIGHT LOG ✈️🍆!' 

Annual CPAC Texas HOEDOWN 💃🤠 turning into ECON ROAST 🔥🍗 – conservatives MIXED like a bad Tinder swipe 👆😬, but ALL AGREE: 'Affordability's the THICC 🍑 ISSUE making wallets DRY 😩🏜️!' Trump squad BETTER STEP UP 📈👟 or CPAC 2025 turns into WALLET WEEPING FESTIVAL 😭💸 – MAGA, time to MOON 🚀 the prices or get YEETED 📉 by voter salt! 😂🤑‼️
